metadata.description: WordPress plugin development toolkit for Claude Code — install only the lifecycle stages you need.

plugins.name: kuira-wp-core
plugins.description: Core build experience — /wp-new wizard, scaffolding, secure endpoints, blocks, custom tables, UI routing, WPCS context, and safety hooks. Start here.

plugins.name: kuira-wp-quality
plugins.description: Testing (PHPUnit/Playwright/Playground), PHPStan static analysis, security audit, Plugin Check, and auditor agents.

plugins.name: kuira-wp-ship
plugins.description: Release + distribution — version bump, dist zip, CI, wordpress.org deploy, readme.txt, i18n, hook docs.

plugins.name: kuira-wp-maintain
plugins.description: Maintenance — legacy modernization, PHP 8.x compatibility, and runtime debugging.
